CustomField.description:
Id of the event (Invoice, Payment, Assembly Event) that caused the MR amounts to change, prefixed with a character to indicate the type.
Assembly MR Fund Transfer: Update {Snapshot Event Record ID} with: 'T' + Assembly MR Fund Transfer ID
Supplement Rent Record: Update {Snapshot Event Record ID} with: 'S' + Lease Record ID
Credit Memo Issuance: Update {Snapshot Event Record ID} with: 'C' + Credit Memo Issuance ID
Invoice Line Item Code: Update {Snapshot Event Record ID} with: 'I' + Invoice Line Item ID
MR Fund Transfer Record Update: Update {Snapshot Event Record ID} with: 'T' + Assembly MR Fund Transfer ID
Payment Line Item Code: Update {Snapshot Event Record ID} with: 'P' + Payment Line Item ID
Payment Code: Update {Snapshot Event Record ID} with: 'P' + Payment Record ID
Supplemental Rent Adjustment: Update {Snapshot Event Record ID} with: 'A' + Supplemental Rent Adjustment ID
CustomField.label: _Snapshot Event Record ID
